case_title: FILIPELLO ANTIQUES, INC DBA FILIPELLO SELF STORAGE vs. LEWIS, RUTHIE JEAN

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILIPELLO ANTIQUES, INC DBA FILIPELLO SELF STORAGE SERVED JUL-17-1992, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, RUTHIE JEAN

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $74.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $37.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILIPELLO ANTIQUES, INC DBA FILIPELLO SELF STORAGE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, RUTHIE JEAN

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF FILIPELLO ANTIQUES, INC DBA FILIPELLO SELF STORAGE HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, RUTHIE JEAN POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMT FOR DETAILS, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $100.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $1,623.00 DAMAGES, $50.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $74.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,747.00

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILIPELLO ANTIQUES, INC DBA FILIPELLO SELF STORAGE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, RUTHIE JEAN SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-16-1992
